从大山沟里走出的陈一凡如愿的考上了师范大学，本以为会因此改变命运，但造化弄人。
同村的大学生女友，为了富二代抛弃了他不说，还下套污蔑他，导致他被迫退学，想把他一辈子按在那个穷山沟里！
然事与愿违，陈一凡虽是穷苦出身，但却没有被压塌脊梁！
他重新踏上那片贫瘠的土地上，谱写了一段人生传奇！
那辱他之人，他亲手掌掴！
那害他之人，他十倍奉还！
那敬他之人，随他君临天下！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4c2df6643b9ed2c7d6316f8b78012298","author":"南风听雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7567766790814567486","book_name":"守村寡女多荒唐","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5292人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7567766823932789310","read_count":"5292","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"873225"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"426","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o618d1af3dc27946429e4ded859aa4df8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388517&x-signature=E0IByehES%2F67QVxsd3AfCFcAqFk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2071098295060471","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"18"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302351687AA44C547033CCA9BA9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3904,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":244},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7583345857849393944","common"
